reason_for_decision: The article now clears the pass threshold with stronger geometry framing, clearer target-type dependence, and more useful layered-range guidance.
strengths: The article now moves beyond headline range and explains why minimum range and decision distance matter.
It correctly ties range class to target type and workflow timing rather than to maximum detection claims alone.
The layered-range conclusion gives the reader a practical planning model instead of a one-number answer.
summary_assessment: This version is strong enough to pass. It is more realistic about range planning and more useful for actual project selection.
